title: Mobile Development
excerpt: Native and cross-platform mobile apps that feel fast, work offline, and integrate cleanly with your platform.

seo.title: Mobile App Development Services | Baalvion
seo.description: Baalvion builds native and cross-platform mobile apps with offline support, clean API integration, and production-grade quality. Explore our process and stack.

benefits: Native-quality experience on iOS and Android
Clean integration with your APIs and identity
One codebase option to move faster

process.desc: Platforms, offline needs, and the core jobs-to-be-done.
Platform-aware UX that respects each OS's conventions.
Cross-platform or native, with automated testing and CI.
Store submission, phased rollout, crash and performance monitoring.

blocks.text: Mobile is where many users actually live, and it's unforgiving — a slow or flaky app gets deleted. Baalvion builds mobile apps that feel fast, handle poor connectivity gracefully, and integrate cleanly with your backend and identity. We choose native or cross-platform based on your goals, not dogma.

items: **Native-quality** experiences that respect iOS and Android conventions.
**Offline-first** patterns so the app works when the network doesn't.
**Clean integration** with your APIs and single sign-on.
**Velocity:** a shared cross-platform codebase when it fits.

blocks.text: We define the platforms and offline requirements, design platform-aware UX, build with automated testing and continuous integration, and release with phased rollouts plus crash and performance monitoring. Quality and observability carry over from our [custom software development](/services/custom-software-development) practice.

React Native with TypeScript for shared codebases, Swift and Kotlin for native modules and performance-critical paths, offline sync patterns, and mobile CI/CD for repeatable releases. We connect apps to platform APIs the [API-first](/news/tech/api-first-architecture) way.

Our apps plug into the same secure identity and API layer that powers the rest of the platform — see [a canonical multi-tenant identity platform](/case-studies/multi-tenant-identity-platform). Pair mobile with [cloud solutions](/services/cloud-solutions) and [DevOps](/services/devops) for a complete delivery pipeline.

faqs.q: Native or cross-platform — which should we choose?
faqs.a: Cross-platform (React Native) maximises speed and code reuse for most apps; native (Swift/Kotlin) suits performance-critical or deeply platform-specific features. We often combine both.
Yes. We use offline-first sync patterns so core functionality keeps working through poor or absent connectivity and reconciles when back online.

faqs.q: How do apps integrate with our systems?
faqs.a: Through a clean, API-first integration and shared single sign-on — see [API-first architecture](/news/tech/api-first-architecture).

faqs.q: Do you handle store release and monitoring?
faqs.a: Yes — store submission, phased rollouts, and crash/performance monitoring are part of the release process.
